title: aira capillaris var. corsica
intro: Aira capillaris var. corsica, also known as Corsican hair grass, is a plant species that belongs to the grass family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aira capillaris var. corsica include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of this plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
